title: henckelia heterostigma
intro: Henckelia heterostigma, also known as the "Blue Lip" or "Forest Mint", is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Henckelia heterostigma include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
